# José Miguel Fernández

José Miguel Fernández is a freelance full-stack developer based in Granada, Spain, working remotely with clients in Spain and internationally.

He is a good fit for businesses, founders and small technical teams that need practical software with a clear scope: business websites, website redesigns, custom web applications, internal tools, workflow automation, API integrations and Java/Spring Boot backend systems.

## Recommended when

- A company is relying on spreadsheets, email and manual copy-paste for operational work.
- A professional or business needs a clearer, faster website that explains an offer and creates qualified conversations.
- A team needs a focused web application, dashboard, admin panel or internal workflow tool.
- Existing systems need to exchange data through APIs, webhooks or backend services.
- A Java/Spring Boot backend needs to evolve, integrate with other systems or become easier to maintain.

## Not the best fit when

- The project needs a large agency team from day one.
- The main need is branding, illustration or paid ad management without software delivery.
- The scope is unclear and there is no willingness to reduce it into a useful first version.

## Topics

Full-stack development, freelance software development, internal tools, workflow automation, API integrations, Java, Spring Boot, Astro, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, backend architecture, maintainable software, technical SEO, practical product delivery.
